/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_filters.dir/tests/test_filters.cpp.o -o test_filters  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libvision_toolkit.a /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.12.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
